title: Types of non-adherence and reasons why patients do not adhere
paperName: Paper 3 - Specialist Options: Approaches, Issues and Debates
summary: 9990 Health — medication non-adherence types and barriers to following treatment.
learningObjectives: Define adherence and types of non-adherence.
Analyse Health Belief Model predictors of adherence.
Evaluate demographic, cognitive, and practical barriers.

simpleExplanation.title: Why patients don't follow advice
simpleExplanation.summary: Non-adherence ranges from forgetting doses to deliberately stopping treatment — driven by beliefs, side effects, cost, and misunderstanding.
steps: Intentional — fear side effects, feel better.
Health Belief Model — perceived threat, benefits.

sections.content: **Non-adherence types** (3.2.1) opens 3.2. Apply **Health Belief Model** with examples.
